'''鈭歬-ch-r''' ('''kakachar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quislingize|quislingize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quislingize|quislingize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| kakachar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachar|thikachar]] || [[word:jikachar|jikachar]] || [[word:shikachar|shikachar]] || [[word:kikachar|kikachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachar|thuthukachar]] || [[word:jujukachar|jujukachar]] || [[word:shushukachar|shushukachar]] || [[word:kukukachar|kukukachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachar|thukachar]] || [[word:jukachar|jukachar]] || [[word:shukachar|shukachar]] || [[word:kukachar|kukachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachar|thukachar]] || [[word:jukachar|jukachar]] || [[word:shukachar|shukachar]] || [[word:kukachar|kukachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachar|thekachar]] || [[word:jekachar|jekachar]] || [[word:shekachar|shekachar]] || [[word:kekachar|kekachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachar|thothokachar]] || [[word:jojokachar|jojokachar]] || [[word:shoshokachar|shoshokachar]] || [[word:kokokachar|kokokachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachar|thokachar]] || [[word:jokachar|jokachar]] || [[word:shokachar|shokachar]] || [[word:kokachar|kokachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachar|thokachar]] || [[word:jokachar|jokachar]] || [[word:shokachar|shokachar]] || [[word:kokachar|kokachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kachar|th忙kachar]] || [[word:j忙kachar|j忙kachar]] || [[word:sh忙kachar|sh忙kachar]] || [[word:k忙kachar|k忙kachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakachar|thathakachar]] || [[word:jajakachar|jajakachar]] || [[word:shashakachar|shashakachar]] || [[word:kakakachar|kakakachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachar|thakachar]] || [[word:jakachar|jakachar]] || [[word:shakachar|shakachar]] || [[word:kakachar|kakachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachar|thakachar]] || [[word:jakachar|jakachar]] || [[word:shakachar|shakachar]] || [[word:kakachar|kakachar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakachar|shakachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakachar|goshakachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakachar|gokishakachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakacharn眉|shakacharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakacharnkn眉|goshakacharnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakacharn眉|gokishakacharn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakacharsh毛|shakacharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakacharnksh毛|goshakacharnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakacharsh毛|gokishakacharsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakacharo|shakacharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakacharnkro|goshakacharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakacharo|gokishakacharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakacharmu|shakacharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakacharnkmu|goshakacharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakacharmu|gokishakacharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakacharsher|shakacharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakacharnksher|goshakacharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakacharsher|gokishakacharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakacharng|shakacharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakacharnkng|goshakacharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakacharng|gokishakacharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakacharya|shakacharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakacharnkya|goshakacharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakacharya|gokishakacharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakacharyam|shakacharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakacharnkyam|goshakacharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakacharyam|gokishakacharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakacharn眉sh毛|shakacharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakacharnkn眉sh毛|goshakacharnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakacharn眉sh毛|gokishakacharn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakacharn眉ro|shakacharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakacharnkn眉ro|goshakacharnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakacharn眉ro|gokishakacharn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakacharn眉mu|shakacharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakacharnkn眉mu|goshakacharnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakacharn眉mu|gokishakacharn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakacharsh毛n眉|shakacharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakacharnksh毛n眉|goshakacharnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakacharsh毛n眉|gokishakacharsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakacharsh毛ro|shakacharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakacharnksh毛ro|goshakacharnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakacharsh毛ro|gokishakacharsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakacharsh毛mu|shakacharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakacharnksh毛mu|goshakacharnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakacharsh毛mu|gokishakacharsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakacharon眉|shakacharon眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakacharnkron眉|goshakacharnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakacharon眉|gokishakacharon眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakacharosh毛|shakacharosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakacharnkrosh毛|goshakacharnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakacharosh毛|gokishakacharosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakacharomu|shakacharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakacharnkromu|goshakacharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakacharomu|gokishakacharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakacharmun眉|shakacharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakacharnkmun眉|goshakacharnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakacharmun眉|gokishakacharmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakacharmush毛|shakacharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakacharnkmush毛|goshakacharnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakacharmush毛|gokishakacharmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakacharmuro|shakacharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakacharnkmuro|goshakacharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakacharmuro|gokishakacharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
